reviews.review_description: This is a finally crafted piece of history, science, and imagination. J. Dakota Powell’s “M. Curie” leads you through the successes - and challenges of the great scientist’s life, using VR‘s astonishing capacity to put you right there in the room where it happened. And the games make the experience so much more than just a slice of history. I highly recommend this experience for kids and adults.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the wonderful review!!

reviews.review_description: This is a unique experience that combines elements of exploration and learning. Each chapter takes you through a different period in Curie’s life and presents puzzle-like scenarios that require you to complete challenges before moving on to subsequent chapters. Along the way, you’ll learn about Curie’s path to making groundbreaking discoveries and becoming a revered historical figure. It’s a well-made app that weaves gamification with discovery. I really enjoyed this and highly recommend it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for this thoughtful review, it's much appreciated!

reviews.review_description: I love this game and how it taught me the history and thought process of Marie Curie. I'm happy that the game M. Curie exists.

developer_response.body: Thank you for this lovely review!
